title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 13 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 13 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 13 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/02/2025
Today, iron ore futures fluctuated downward, with a sharp drop at the close. The most-traded I2505 contract finallysettled at 808 yuan/mt, down 1.52% for the day. Traders showed reduced enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills purchased as needed.
